title: Can't find a proper physical plan for this query
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
CREATE TABLE t (a INT NOT NULL, b INT UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT NOT NULL, b INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t (a, b) VALUES (1, 100), (2, 200), (3, 300);
INSERT INTO t1 (a, b) VALUES (1, 50), (2, 150), (3, 250);
Error executing SQL:
EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t.a > 0 THEN (SELECT SUM(b) FROM t1 WHERE t.a = t1.a GROUP BY t.a HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ELSE 0 END) FROM t LEFT JOIN t1 ON t.a = t1.a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t t2 WHERE t2.b < 250) GROUP BY t.a WITH ROLLUP
Error Message:(1815, "Internal : Can't find a proper physical plan for this query")

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The physical plan for this query

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
Error Message:(1815, "Internal : Can't find a proper physical plan for this query")

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
mysql> SELECT TIDB_VERSION();
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| TIDB_VERSION()                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v7.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 7d16cc79e81bbf573124df3fd9351c26963f3e70
Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v7.5.1
UTC Build Time: 2024-02-27 14:28:32
GoVersion: go1.21.6
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: unistore |
+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (a INT NOT NULL, b VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t2 (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', 20.5), (3, 'test3', 30.5);
CREATE TABLE t3 (a INT NOT NULL, b INT DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE (a, b));
INSERT INTO t3 (a, b) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 100), (3, 200);

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t2.a > 0 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE t2.a = t3.a GROUP BY t3.b HAVING SUM(b) IS NOT NULL) ELSE 0 END) FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t3 ON t2.a = t3.a WHERE t3.b IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t2.a WITH ROLLUP;
key_bug_features: EXPLAIN ANALYZE with complex subquery and GROUP BY
